action: Check video generation status at: https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}} until all videos are marked successful.

recipe.steps: Retrieve the conv_id for each video from memory.
Check the video generation status using the URL https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}}.
Repeat the status check until all videos are marked successful.
Save the successful status of each video in memory using a key structure such as 'videos.successful'.
